  fhir:title [ fhir:v "ConceptMap for mapping Nuva vaccine codes to SNOMED-CT vaccine codes"] ; # 
  fhir:status [ fhir:v "active"] ; # 
  fhir:experimental [ fhir:v false] ; # 
  fhir:date [ fhir:v "2026-06-10T09:49:50+00:00"^^xsd:dateTime] ; # 
  fhir:publisher [ fhir:v "HL7 Switzerland"] ; # 
  fhir:contact ( [
fhir:name [ fhir:v "HL7 Switzerland" ] ;
    ( fhir:telecom [
fhir:system [ fhir:v "url" ] ;
fhir:value [ fhir:v "https://www.hl7.ch/" ]     ] )
  ] [
fhir:name [ fhir:v "HL7 Switzerland" ] ;
    ( fhir:telecom [
fhir:system [ fhir:v "url" ] ;
fhir:value [ fhir:v "https://www.hl7.ch/" ] ;
fhir:use [ fhir:v "work" ]     ] )
  ] ) ; # 
  fhir:description [ fhir:v "This ConceptMap maps vaccine codes from the Nuva terminology to the corresponding codes in the SNOMED-CT CodeSystem. It is generated based on the provided CSV mapping file and the SNOMED-CT CodeSystem."] ; # 
  fhir:jurisdiction ( [
    ( fhir:coding [
fhir:system [
fhir:v "urn:iso:std:iso:3166"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <urn:iso:std:iso:3166>       ] ;
fhir:code [ fhir:v "CH" ]     ] )
  ] ) ; # 
  fhir:copyright [ fhir:v "CC0-1.0"] ; #

a fhir:Uri ;
fhir:v "http://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-nuva?vs"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-nuva?vs>
  ] ; # 
  fhir:target [
a fhir:Uri ;
fhir:v "http://fhir.ch/ig/ch-vacd/ValueSet/ch-vacd-vaccines-snomedct-vs"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://fhir.ch/ig/ch-vacd/ValueSet/ch-vacd-vaccines-snomedct-vs>
  ] ; #
